_comment: User-tunable conflict rules, applied AFTER the engine's built-in clothing/background logic. Slot names match the data file stems (e.g. hairstyles, outerwear, headwear, interior). 'directed_slot_rules': when the 'if_present' slot has any tag, every slot listed in 'remove' is cleared. 'exclusive_slot_groups': keep only one slot per group (chosen deterministically from the seed). Edit and save; changes are picked up automatically. The '_comment' and '_example' keys are ignored by the engine.
